items.html: The male's Gadlut [adulthood] is made first, over the course of thirteen years and one day; and after the male's Gadlut, the twelve years and one day of the female's Gadlut begin. The reason is that the whole of the male's Gadlut is through the Mochin [minds] extended into him; and after they have finished expanding in him and he has grown, the illumination of these Mochin then goes out through the orifice of the Chazeh [chest] at his back and builds her. Thus she is found to be built after the building of the male, as the verse says, "It is not good that the man should be alone; I will make him a help meet for him," etc. And so we see with the very sense of sight, that a man is always greater in years than his wife.
